mcq:
I _____ my homework.
a) finish b) finished c) have finished d) finishing

She _____ to London before.
a) go b) goes c) went d) has gone
tf: We use present perfect for actions that happened at an unspecified time in the past. [True/False]
I have seen that movie yesterday. [True/False]
short: Write a sentence using 'have never been'
Change to present perfect: I eat lunch

mcq:
A person who flies a plane is a:
a) Driver b) Pilot c) Captain d) Sailor

A person who works in a hospital and helps doctors is a:
a) Nurse b) Teacher c) Engineer d) Farmer
tf: A chef works in a farm. [True/False]
long: Write about your dream job in 5 sentences

mcq:
Mount Everest is the _____ mountain in the world.
a) high b) higher c) highest d) most high

My house is _____ than yours.
a) big b) bigger c) biggest d) more big
tf: We add -est to short adjectives for superlative. [True/False]
short: Make a sentence using 'the most interesting'

mcq:
A sudden shaking of the ground is a:
a) Flood b) Earthquake c) Storm d) Volcano

Heavy rain that covers land with water is a:
a) Drought b) Flood c) Fire d) Wind
tf: We should prepare for natural disasters. [True/False]
short: What should you do during an earthquake?

mcq:
The book _____ by Ahmed.
a) write b) writes c) was written d) writing

Rice _____ in Egypt.
a) grow b) grows c) is grown d) growing
tf: Passive voice focuses on the action, not the doer. [True/False]
We use 'be' + past participle in passive. [True/False]
short: Change to passive: The teacher explains the lesson
Write a sentence in passive voice

mcq:
_____ pollution harms the air we breathe.
a) Water b) Air c) Noise d) Soil

We should _____ plastic to reduce waste.
a) burn b) recycle c) throw d) waste
tf: Planting trees helps reduce air pollution. [True/False]
Throwing garbage in the street is good for the environment. [True/False]
short: Name 3 ways to protect the environment
long: Write about how to keep your school clean

mcq:
You _____ do your homework.
a) can b) should c) may d) might

I _____ swim when I was 10.
a) can b) could c) should d) must
short: Give advice using 'should' for a sick friend

mcq:
We use _____ to send emails.
a) Telephone b) Computer c) Radio d) TV

The internet helps us _____ information.
a) lose b) hide c) share d) forget
tf: Social media is a way of communication. [True/False]
Technology has no effect on our life. [True/False]
short: How do you use technology in studying?
long: Write about the importance of technology in modern life
